reviews.review_description: Would be a nice app if not these prices straight from the moon for each small feature.
The game is stupidly priced this also won't make you an amazing sprayer(trust me I'm actually qualified to spray) just a little but of fun

The game is cool and definitely will help people paint but the prices for the adds are outrageous 150$ to paint a car in VR and you are only stuck painting a car door and a electric box and on top of if you actually wanna learn you would have to pay 80$ to actually learn better off going to a trade school
